{{CargoClone
|name=Warscar Zhou Tai
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=161
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Per 10% HP lost, {race} DEF +60
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Skin DEF +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Skin DEF +50%
|}}
